_comment: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) -- copper, the canonical commodity cyclical. Illustrative, NOT a live call. The whole discipline: feed THROUGH-CYCLE NORMALIZED margins and a price-deck-derived revenue path, never current-spot extrapolation. Money in $M, shares in M, rates decimals. Drives dcf_valuation.py.
_revenue: ~$25B base; growth = copper volume + a normalized real-price drift declining to terminal. NOT a spot-price extrapolation.
_margin: through-cycle NORMALIZED EBIT margin ~22% now, ~25% mid-cycle target. A copper miner swings 10-35%; the point is to value the average, not the peak.
_tax: high effective tax via mining royalties / Indonesian terms
_terminal: mid-cycle ROC ~10%, a thin durable spread -- commodities rarely compound excess returns
_minority: material minority at the Indonesian (Grasberg) operations
